    exact ha ▸ a.2
  rwa [IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot A] at hx'

rw [isIntegrallyClosed_iff, ← IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot A]
  refine le_iInf₂ fun p hp x hx ↦ ?_
  letI := IsKrullDomain.isDiscreteValuationRing_localization p hp
  haveI : IsFractionRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) (FractionRing A) :=
    IsLocalization.isFractionRing_of_isLocalization (M := p.1.primeCompl) p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors
  rw [← IsIntegrallyClosed.isIntegral_iff (K := FractionRing A)]
  exact IsIntegral.tower_top hx
